parameters.name: Lock
parameters.description: Locks the device for player interaction when set to 1. Unlocks it, when set to 0.

parameters.name: On
parameters.description: Turns the device on, when set >= 1. Turns it off, when set to <1.

parameters.name: RequestHash
parameters.description: Write ItemHash to device to immediate output

outputs.name: Power
outputs.description: Returns whether the device is turned on and receives power. (0 for no, 1 for yes).

outputs.name: Error
outputs.description: Returns whether the device is flashing an error. (0 for no, 1 for yes).

outputs.name: Lock
outputs.description: Reads if the device is locked.

outputs.name: ImportCount
outputs.description: Incremented each time an item stack enter by the Import slot

outputs.name: ExportCount
outputs.description: Incremented each time an item stack exit by the Export Slot

outputs.name: Quantity
outputs.description: Storage space used in whole numbers.

outputs.name: On
outputs.description: Returns whether the device is turned on. (0 for no, 1 for yes)

outputs.name: RequiredPower
outputs.description: Returns the current amount of power, required by the device, in watts.
